title: Richardella parviflora
taxonomy: Richardella parviflora is classified within the family Fabaceae, which is commonly known as the pea or legume family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and morphology. Richardella parviflora is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is a small tree or shrub species. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae, which includes many other legume species. Richardella parviflora's classification is further supported by its compound leaves and showy flowers.
